Electrician in Elkhorn, NE

Trusted local professionals serving Elkhorn and surrounding communities

Serving Elkhorn, NE

Bruce Kutler Electric is proud to serve the residents and businesses of Elkhorn, Nebraska, with our comprehensive electrical services. As a thriving community with a mix of residential and commercial properties, Elkhorn demands reliable and efficient electrical solutions. We are committed to providing top-notch service and ensuring the safety and functionality of your electrical systems. We offer a full range of electrical services in Elkhorn, including wiring, lighting, panel upgrades, surge protection, and more. Our goal is to provide exceptional customer service and competitive pricing to the residents and businesses of Elkhorn. Bruce Kutler Electric is your trusted partner for all your electrical needs.

Elkhorn, a growing suburb of Omaha, features a mix of new developments and established neighborhoods, each with specific electrical requirements.
